messages.content:
Prior to the Delivery of the Plant to the Buyer, a Preliminary Acceptance shall be conducted by the Buyer at the Supplier's premises using the Supplier's lithium to obtain the following products:
Lithium granules with dimensions Ø 6.0±0.05 x 12±1.00 mm.
Lithium tape measuring 0.5±0.05 mm × 60±1.00 mm (thickness, width).
Lithium plate with dimensions 13.6±2mm × 92±1mm × 150mm-300mm (thickness, width, length).
The Unit will be delivered to the Buyer.请翻译成中文

在供应商的场地上，买方将对供应商的锂进行初步验收。验收项目包括获取以下产品：
尺寸为 Ø6.0±0.05 x 12±1.00 mm 的锂颗粒。
尺寸为 0.5±0.05 mm × 60±1.00 mm（厚度，宽度）的锂带。
尺寸为 13.6±2mm × 92±1mm × 150mm-300mm（厚度，宽度，长度）的锂板。
该设备将会交付给买方。

Transfer of the Unit: The Unit will be transferred in full accordance with the provisions outlined in Section 5 and Section 6 of this TOR. The transfer will include the issuance of the following documents in duplicate:

Invoice (2 copies)
Equipment Transfer Acceptance Certificate (2 copies)
Acceptance Certificate 1st stage (2 copies)请翻译成中文

设备的转移：该设备将按照本招标文件第5和第6条的规定进行全面转移。转移将包括以下文件的双份发行：

发票（2份副本）
设备转移验收证书（2份副本）
第一阶段验收证书（2份副本）

ACT of carrying out commissioning works in 2 copies;
ACT of acceptance into operation based on the results of acceptance tests in 2 copies.翻译成中文

进行投运工作的行动记录书各两份；
基于验收测试结果的投入运行接收报告书各两份。

Supervised Installation and Commissioning:
The Supplier will conduct supervised installation and commissioning of the Unit on the Buyer's premises.

Acceptance Tests:
Acceptance tests will be performed on the Buyer's premises according to programs developed by the Supplier.

Provision of Lithium Raw Materials:
The Buyer is responsible for providing the necessary lithium raw materials for commissioning and acceptance of the equipment on the Buyer's site, and the associated costs will be borne by the Buyer.请翻译成中文

监督安装和调试：
供应商将在买方场地上进行监督安装和调试设备。

验收测试：
验收测试将根据供应商制定的方案在买方场地上进行。

锂原材料供应：
买方负责为设备的调试和验收提供必要的锂原材料，相关费用由买方承担。

Parameter:
Pressing force, t
Plunger stroke, mm
Extruder barrel inner diameter, mm;
Extruder length, mm
Extruder width, mm
Extruder height, mm
Extruder weight, kg, no more
AC power supply, V
Productivity on initial ingots, not less than, kg/day
Feed mode: fast forward, manual transmission, speed lock, automatic speed tracking
Extruder control mode: electric control (with protection), control devices include timely display, extrusion speed lock, automatic speed tracking, speed matching interface with winder, etc.
Extruder vacuum control mode: manual and automatic
Die lock mode: hydraulic lock (no thread lock)
Die opening mode: hydraulic die opening (non-spiral)
Extruder barrel quick change
Feed mode: feed forward
Operating environment, dew point ºС
Loading original product left/right 请翻译成中文

参数：
压力力量，吨
柱塞行程，毫米
挤出机筒内径，毫米；
挤出机长度，毫米
挤出机宽度，毫米
挤出机高度，毫米
挤出机重量，千克，不超过
交流电供应电压，伏特
初始锭子生产能力，不低于，千克/天
送料方式：快退、手动换挡、速度锁定、自动速度跟踪
挤出机控制模式：电控（带保护），控制设备包括及时显示、挤出速度锁定、自动速度跟踪、与卷绕机匹配的接口等。
挤出机真空控制模式：手动和自动
模具锁定模式：液压锁定（无螺纹锁定）
模具开启模式：液压开启（非螺旋式）
挤出机筒体快速更换
送料模式：前进送料
操作环境，露点 ºС
原材料加载左/右侧

Parameter:
Winding machine structure: standard winding machine
Winding mode: on a spool, transverse winding with tracking
Thickness adjustment mode: pendulum weight control mode, determined by the shape of the mold, automatic winding speed lock. Recoil speed: manual stepless adjustment and adaptive host
Winder length, mm
Winder width, mm
Winder height, mm
Winder weight, kg no more
Operating environment, dew point ºС
Winding lithium tape on reels
Coils for winding foil, pieces, not less than
Winder power switch equipment
Coil speed control system
Productivity on a foil at continuous operation, kg/days, not less than 请翻译成中文

参数：
卷绕机结构：标准卷绕机
卷绕方式：在卷筒上进行，横向卷绕并进行跟踪
厚度调整模式：摆锤式重量控制模式，由模具形状确定，自动卷绕速度锁定。回卷速度：手动无级调节和自适应主机
卷绕机长度，毫米
卷绕机宽度，毫米
卷绕机高度，毫米
卷绕机重量，千克，不超过
操作环境，露点ºС
卷绕锂带在卷筒上
卷绕箔片的卷盘数量，不少于
卷绕机电源开关设备
卷盘速度控制系统
在连续操作下，箔片的生产能力，千克/天，不低于

Parameter:


Design of the hydraulic, vacuum and electrical integrated system - modular
Oil tank capacity, not less than, l
Hydraulic pump motor input voltage, V
Module length, mm
Module width, mm
Module height, mm
Module weight, kg, no more
The total power of the hydraulic pumping station, not more than, kW
Equipped with an uninterruptible power supply for low-voltage systems
Input voltage of DC control logic circuit, V, not more than
Hydraulic oil supply and return hoses
Vacuum hoses
Cable connecting the main control cabinet to the control panels of the Unit 请翻译成中文

参数：
液压、真空和电气一体化系统的设计 - 模块化
油箱容量，不低于，升
液压泵电机输入电压，伏特
模块长度，毫米
模块宽度，毫米
模块高度，毫米
模块重量，千克，不超过
液压泵站的总功率，不超过，千瓦
配备低压系统的不间断电源
直流控制逻辑电路的输入电压，伏特，不超过
液压油供应和回流软管
真空软管
将主控柜与设备控制面板连接的电缆

Parameter:

Console version left/right
The main interface for controlling the Unit through a programmable logic controller language version - Russian and/or English
Touch screen with timely display of the process and working status of the extruder, automatic detection, alarm and storage of the length of the lithium tape. The main control and display cabinet are installed independently and connected with a multi-core shielded cable.
Restarting the Unit after a power failure, uninterruptible power supply
Vacuum control mode: manual and automatic
Mold locking method: hydraulic locking (locking without thread)
Mold opening method: hydraulic mold opening (non-spiral type)
Location of the control panel - on the frame of the extruder
Emergency stop button
Equipped with an access control and management system using a key
Consolidation of signals from primary sensors from all units Installations on the control system 请翻译成中文

参数：

控制台版本左/右
通过可编程逻辑控制器语言版本控制设备的主要接口 - 俄语和/或英语
触摸屏，实时显示挤出机的工艺和工作状态，自动检测、报警和存储锂带长度。主控制和显示柜独立安装，并通过多芯屏蔽电缆连接。
停电后重新启动设备，无间断电源
真空控制模式：手动和自动
模具锁定方法：液压锁定（无螺纹锁定）
模具开启方法：液压开启（非螺旋式）
控制面板的位置 - 在挤出机的框架上
紧急停止按钮
配备使用钥匙的门禁控制和管理系统
将来自所有设备的主要传感器的信号集中到控制系统中

参数：

型材截面：
• 锂颗粒，Ø 6.0±0.05 x 12±1.00 mm;
• 锂带，0.5±0.05 mm × 60±1.00 mm，（厚度，宽度）；
• 锂板，13.6±2mm×92±1mm×150mm-300mm（厚度，宽度，长度）;
模具的可更换性
模具清洁工具
模具更换工具

The manufacturer's documentation must include the following:

A list of self-service tasks and a separate list of tasks that require the engagement of qualified specialists.

Clear specifications regarding the qualifications and expertise required for personnel conducting the service.

Information on wear parts, including article numbers and the manufacturers of these components.

A graphical sequence of actions for maintenance personnel to follow when replacing parts.请翻译成中文

制造商的文件必须包括以下内容：

自助任务清单和需要专业技术人员参与的任务单独清单。

明确规定进行维修服务的人员所需的资格和专业知识的规格。

有关易损件的信息，包括零件编号和这些组件的制造商。

维修人员在更换零件时需要遵循的动作图示序列。

Information Documents Provided Upon Delivery:

Upon delivery, the following information documents must be provided in Russian and/or English:

Operation and Maintenance Manual: This manual should include specifications for all components, mechanisms, and equipment within the Installation, along with the manufacturer's details.

Operator's Manual: A manual for operators.

Operational Documentation: operational documentation for units and components used.

Spare Parts and Consumables: A list of spare parts and accessories, including details about manufacturers. Additionally, a list of consumable parts should be provided.

Installation Instructions: Documentation for installation, start-up, adjustment, repair, and Unit adjustments.

Extruder Molds and Cutters/Knives: Documentation for extruder molds and the bar and plate cutting device.

Acceptance Test Program: An acceptance test program agreed upon with the customer.

Software: Necessary software on a storage medium for restoring the functionality of the Unit. This should include software keys and passwords, as agreed.

Documentation Requirements:

Electronic vs. Paper: Electronic versions of documents must mirror the structure and content of the paper originals.

Format: Text documents should be provided in PDF format.

Bound Copies: Documentation, including CDs for tooling and text documents, should be supplied as one bound original copy and two bound copies.

Copyright and Third-Party Software:

The implementation of technical, software, organizational, and other solutions outlined in the technical documentation should not infringe upon the copyright and related rights of third parties.

When using programs (software systems or components) developed by third parties in the Installation, the transfer conditions for the right to use these programs should not impose restrictions that hinder the Installation's intended purpose and technology.

Guarantee of Non-Infringement:

The Supplier guarantees that the completed stages and documents provided to the Buyer do not violate the exclusive rights of third parties.请翻译成中文

交付时需提供的信息文档：

在交付时，以下信息文档必须以俄语和/或英语提供：

操作和维护手册：该手册应包括安装中所有组件、机制和设备的规格，以及制造商的详细信息。

操作员手册：操作员手册。

操作文档：用于单位和使用的组件的操作文档。

备件和耗材：备件和配件清单，包括制造商的详细信息。此外，应提供耗材部件的清单。

安装说明：用于安装、启动、调整、维修和单位调整的文档。

挤出机模具和切割器/刀具：挤出机模具和条板切割装置的文档。

验收测试方案：与客户商定的验收测试方案。

软件：用于恢复单位功能的存储介质上的必要软件。其中应包括软件密钥和密码，经双方同意。

文档要求：

电子与纸质文档：电子版文档应与纸质原件的结构和内容相同。

格式：文本文档应以PDF格式提供。

装订副本：文档，包括用于工具和文本文件的光盘，应提供作为一份装订的原件和两份装订副本。

版权和第三方软件：

技术文档中所描述的技术、软件、组织和其他解决方案的实施不应侵犯第三方的版权和相关权利。

在安装中使用由第三方开发的程序（软件系统或组件）时，使用这些程序的使用权转让条件不应对安装的预期目的和技术施加限制。

不侵权担保：

供应商保证所完成的阶段和提供给买方的文档不侵犯第三方的专有权利。

Packing Requirements: The packaging method must adhere to railway packaging standards and consist of a fully enclosed wooden box (fumigation required). The packaging must ensure the complete safety of the unit throughout the entire transportation period, taking into account potential overloads.请翻译成中文
包装要求：包装方法必须符合铁路包装标准，采用全封闭的木箱（需要熏蒸处理）。包装必须确保在整个运输过程中，考虑到潜在的超载情况，单位完全安全。
